---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for libdrmtap
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to an existing limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Context

- Is this GPU-specific? Which GPU/driver?
- Does another project (kmsvnc, FFmpeg, etc.) already implement this?
- Link to any relevant kernel docs or upstream references.

## Would you be willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I need guidance on where to start
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting
